name: adaptive-ui-engineer
description: Audit, simplify, and verify resilient responsive web interfaces.

interface.longDescription: Audit, refactor, and verify responsive web interfaces with evidence-based compatibility, accessibility, and complexity checks.
defaultPrompt: Audit this interface for responsive, accessibility, and browser compatibility issues.
Simplify this UI without changing its product intent or existing framework.
Verify this page across target viewports, zoom levels, and keyboard navigation.
